problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
